live.title: Indian Idol
live.shortDescription: Indian Idol 16 – “Yaadon Ki Playlist” celebrates music that brings back cherished memories and emotions. For the first time ever, auditions go outdoors, traveling across India to discover raw talent, hosted by the legendary Udit Narayan, while Aditya Narayan returns as the main host. The judges - Vishal Dadlani, Shreya Ghoshal, and Badshah - search for voices that touch hearts. A season where every song is a memory, and every melody tells a story.
live.longDescription: Indian Idol 16 – “Yaadon Ki Playlist” celebrates music that brings back cherished memories and emotions. For the first time ever, auditions go outdoors, traveling across India to discover raw talent, hosted by the legendary Udit Narayan, while Aditya Narayan returns as the main host. The judges - Vishal Dadlani, Shreya Ghoshal, and Badshah - search for voices that touch hearts. A season where every song is a memory, and every melody tells a story.

upcoming.title: Main Woh Aur Fuji
upcoming.shortDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures. Seven years later, beneath the shadow of Mount Fuji, they meet again carrying different lives, different scars, confronting a past that never truly left them. Can love survive its own history or shall it merely haunt them? Witness Lalit Prabhakar and Mrinmayee Godbole in a fresh, new-age romantic movie Main Woh Aur Fuji, streaming from 10th April, on Sony LIV.
